steps.title: Separate two sentences
steps.content: The first clause states that Kizomba has become an international phenomenon. The next sentence begins with the 2022 example of Elvis and Namrata winning the Olympiads of Kizomba competition.

steps.title: Reject fused clauses
steps.content: A creates a run-on, B creates a comma splice, and C uses and in without correctly joining the clauses. The sentence needs a period before the 2022 example. The answer is D.
